title: draba subglabra
intro: Draba subglabra, also known as Arctic whitlowgrass, is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Draba subglabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, but further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
